headline: Which Cruise Giant Actually Delivers the Smarter Return for Investors?
summary: Royal Caribbean (NYSE: RCL), Carnival (NYSE: CCL), and Norwegian Cruise Line (NYSE: NCLH) all sailed through the same pandemic, the same fuel spike, and the same demand recovery. The five-year returns tell three completely different stories: Royal Caribbean +190.6%, Carnival −16.7%, Norwegian −36.2%. For retirement-focused investors evaluating the cruise industry, the question is whether Royal ... Which Cruise Giant Actually Delivers the Smarter Return for Investors?

headline: Nasdaq and Dow open higher as Trump claims Iran peace talks
summary: 10am: Nasdaq opens higher, travel and tech names in lead US stocks opened sharply higher, with the Dow Jones up 1.8%, the S&P 500 gaining 1.7% and the Nasdaq rising 2.0% in early trade. Gains were led by travel and tech names, with Norwegian Cruise Line up 6.4%, Carnival gaining 6.0%...

content.title: Nasdaq and Dow open higher as Trump claims Iran peace talks
content.summary: 10am: Nasdaq opens higher, travel and tech names in lead US stocks opened sharply higher, with the Dow Jones up 1.8%, the S&P 500 gaining 1.7% and the Nasdaq rising 2.0% in early trade. Gains were led by travel and tech names, with Norwegian Cruise Line up 6.4%, Carnival gaining 6.0%...
